segments.caption: The video segment shows a top-down view of a crafting process on a clean white surface. The hands use a crumpled white cloth to dab and blend the stain, creating a mottled, weathered effect on the pots' exteriors. One pot is held and rotated while the stain is applied, and the other two are placed nearby, already partially finished. The hands then pick up all three pots, displaying them side by side to show the uniform, rustic finish. The scene transitions to the placement of two of the pots onto a wooden plank, where a hot glue gun is used to secure them in position, suggesting the creation of a multi-pot planter or decorative arrangement. The workspace remains organized, with a white paper sheet to catch spills and other crafting supplies subtly visible around the edges.

segments.caption: The video begins with a top-down view of a white surface where a pair of hands, with dark nail polish, carefully places three terracotta pots onto a wooden plank, aligning them side by side. The pots are then shown painted white and distressed with a dark brown stain, giving them a weathered, rustic appearance. The hands proceed to fill each pot with lush green artificial succulents, creating a cohesive and decorative display. The finished arrangement is then shown in a well-lit indoor setting, placed on a white countertop against a textured wall, highlighting the final aesthetic. The scene transitions to a new crafting project: a metal tray lined with aluminum foil, where a sheet of paper with a printed vintage-style circular logo reading 'SPECIALITE DE VIOLETTES CANDIES FABRIQUE DE CONFISERIE' is placed. The hands then apply a white adhesive to a light blue metal canister using a foam brush, preparing it for decoupage. The printed paper is carefully aligned and pressed onto the canister, then trimmed with scissors to fit the curved surface. The hands meticulously peel away the backing paper, revealing the transferred design, completing the transformation of the canister into a decorative item with a French confectionery theme.
